description: This file defines API routes related to audit logs within a FastAPI application. It includes a single endpoint to list audit logs, with dependency injection for authentication and data retrieval.

methods.name: list[AuditLogResponse] list_audits( limit: int = 200, offset: int = 0, audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), _: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
methods.description: Asynchronous function to list audit logs with optional limit and offset, returning a list of AuditLogResponse objects.

ctags.name: list_audits
ctags.signature: ( limit: int = 200, offset: int = 0, audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), _: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
